abilities.description: Create a token that's a copy of another target artifact you control. That token gains haste. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

effect.description: Create a token that's a copy of another target artifact you control. That token gains haste. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.
effect.name: CopyPermanent

abilities.target_prompt: Select another target artifact you control

statics.description: Other artifact creatures you control get +1/+0.
